violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Observed boxes of food on floor of walk in cooler and walk in freezer.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed duct tape on seal of walk in freezer. Duct tape is not a cleanable material.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed inside of refrigerator and freezer in food prep area. need to be cleaned.
Toilet facilities. — ---Observed toilet room was not provided with a self closing door.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed food prep area needs a thorough cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
